docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-26-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-26-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF SHUSHON BARDLEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JACKIE MITCHELL IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARDLEY, SHUSHON ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00<WAIVESD>) SERVED NOV-02-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MITCHELL, JACKIE
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARDLEY, SHUSHON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MITCHELL, JACKIE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARDLEY, SHUSHON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MITCHELL, JACKIE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY BARDLEY, SHUSHON MITCHELL, JACKIE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY BARDLEY, SHUSHON AS TO DEFENDANT MITCHELL, JACKIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-26-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-26-2023 - JUDGMENT.
